mapper.insert: INSERT INTO pvp_friend_invite (match_id, challenger_user_id, opponent_user_id, status) VALUES (#{matchId}, #{challengerUserId}, #{opponentUserId}, #{status})
mapper.select: SELECT id, match_id AS matchId, challenger_user_id AS challengerUserId, opponent_user_id AS opponentUserId, status, created_at AS createdAt FROM pvp_friend_invite WHERE match_id = #{matchId} AND status = 'PENDING'

SELECT i.id AS inviteId, i.match_id AS matchId, i.challenger_user_id AS counterpartUserId, COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(u.display_name), ''), u.username) AS counterpartDisplayName FROM pvp_friend_invite i JOIN app_user u ON u.id = i.challenger_user_id WHERE i.opponent_user_id = #{opponentUserId} AND i.status = 'PENDING' ORDER BY i.id DESC

SELECT i.id AS inviteId, i.match_id AS matchId, i.opponent_user_id AS counterpartUserId, COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(u.display_name), ''), u.username) AS counterpartDisplayName FROM pvp_friend_invite i JOIN app_user u ON u.id = i.opponent_user_id WHERE i.challenger_user_id = #{challengerUserId} AND i.status = 'PENDING' ORDER BY i.id DESC
SELECT COUNT(*)::int FROM pvp_friend_invite WHERE opponent_user_id = #{opponentUserId} AND status = 'PENDING'
mapper.update: UPDATE pvp_friend_invite SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id FROM pvp_friend_invite WHERE match_id = #{matchId} AND challenger_user_id = #{challengerUserId} AND status = 'PENDING' LIMIT 1

SELECT id, match_id AS matchId, challenger_user_id AS challengerUserId, opponent_user_id AS opponentUserId, status, created_at AS createdAt FROM pvp_friend_invite WHERE status = 'PENDING' AND created_at < #{cutoff}
mapper.update: UPDATE pvp_friend_invite SET status = 'EXPIRED' WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 'PENDING' AND created_at < #{cutoff}
